ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album to which the song belongs */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the song in milliseconds */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness score of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song in beats per minute */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the song metadata */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language(s) of the song */,
  "copyright_info" TEXT /* Copyright information for the song */,
  "featured_artists" TEXT /* Featured artists on the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label associated with the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the artist is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the album metadata */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover art */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the album in milliseconds */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a compilation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the playlist image */,
  "privacy_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the playlist is public or private */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist containing the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song included in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date the user was last active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user listening to the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being listened to */,
  "listen_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was listened to */,
  "listen_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the song was listened to in milliseconds */,
  "skip_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song was skipped */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for listening (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being analyzed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics record */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song was played */,
  "love_count" INTEGER /* Number of times users marked the song as loved */,
  "skip_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the song was skipped */,
  "average_listen_duration" REAL /* Average duration for which the song was listened to in milliseconds */,
  "genre_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the song within its genre */,
  "region_popularity" TEXT /* Popularity of the song in different regions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
